prompt: Create an ultra-wide 3:1 cinematic macro photograph of a dense cluster of tall shaggy ink cap mushrooms growing in a dark forest floor. The mushrooms have long pale gray stems and bell-shaped caps covered in rough, scaly, granular texture, with caps ranging from cream to smoky charcoal and blackened edges. Compose the cluster across the full width of the frame, cropped tightly so several mushroom caps extend beyond the top edge, with the central group brightest and most detailed. Surround them with damp soil, dead leaves, thin twigs, tangled roots, and shadowy undergrowth. Use low-key moody natural light, deep contrast, muted earthy colors, crisp tactile detail on the caps, dark vignetted corners, shallow depth of field, and a gritty realistic nature-documentary look. The overall mood should feel mysterious, damp, and slightly eerie, like a hidden fungal colony discovered at ground level in the woods.
